title: Eriosema bojeriana
taxonomy: Eriosema bojeriana is classified as a species of flowering plant in the family Fabaceae. This classification places it within the larger family of legumes, which includes a wide range of plants such as beans and peas. The genus Eriosema is further categorized as a part of the subfamily Faboideae. Eriosema bojeriana's classification is also known to be part of the tribe Phaseoleae. This specific classification is based on its botanical characteristics and evolutionary relationships with other plants.
